name: uderia-web
description: Web search and page retrieval. Provides web_search, web_fetch, and web_extract tools using Brave or Serper search APIs.

BRAVE_API_KEY.label: Brave Search API Key
BRAVE_API_KEY.description: API key from search.brave.com/app/keys. Used for web_search.

SERPER_API_KEY.label: Serper API Key
SERPER_API_KEY.description: API key from serper.dev. Alternative to Brave Search.

MAX_RESULTS.label: Max search results
MAX_RESULTS.description: Maximum number of results returned by web_search (1-20).

FETCH_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.label: Fetch timeout (seconds)
FETCH_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.description: Timeout for web_fetch and web_extract HTTP requests.
